item.title: TronCarterNLU: Tron Carter @TronCarterNLU · 4h I would watch this every week from Si Woo and Manny. It’s 15 minutes of joy on the tour’
item.description:
Tron Carter @TronCarterNLU · 4h I would watch this every week from Si Woo and Manny. It’s 15 minutes of joy on the tour’s YT. Cita PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 17 abr. Mic’d up Si Woo Kim is pure entertainment
Everything you didn’t hear from Si Woo Kim in Chasing Sunday: Unheard, now on PGA TOUR YouTube. 2 3 235 62 mil

item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 5h Hole locations for the final round of the RBC Heritage 1 7 49 13 mil
item.description: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 5h Hole locations for the final round of the RBC Heritage 1 7 49 13 mil

PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 5h Who is going to take home the @RBC_Heritage crown on Sunday?
(in partnership with @ROLEX ) 25 10 92 43 mil

item.title: grantboone: Josh Carpenter reposteó Grant Boone @grantboone · 5h 1 for the Money: JM Eagle CEO Walter Wang, who along with his wife
item.description: Josh Carpenter reposteó Grant Boone @grantboone · 5h 1 for the Money: JM Eagle CEO Walter Wang, who along with his wife and PlastPro CEO Shirley, just joined us on the @JMEagleLAChamp broadcast and announced a $1 million purse increase to $4.75m. It was $1.5m when they became title sponsors. 2 1 24 2 mil
